allow: Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "\\dt public.*" -c "\\d crawl_sources")
Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "\\d tags" -c "\\d crawl_histories")
Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT id, name, url, source_type FROM crawl_sources;")
Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "\\d crawl_sources")

Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "INSERT INTO crawl_sources \(name, url, source_type, config\) SELECT ''solved_ac'', ''https://solved.ac/api/v3'', ''API'', ''{""rate_limit_delay"": 0.5}'' WHERE NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM crawl_sources WHERE name = ''solved_ac''\);")
Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT id, name, url, source_type FROM crawl_sources WHERE name = ''solved_ac'';")

Bash(docker exec supabase-db psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT count\(*\) as tags FROM tags;" -c "SELECT count\(*\) as problems FROM problems;" -c "SELECT count\(*\) as recommendations FROM daily_recommendations;" -c "SELECT p.tier, p.title_ko, p.url FROM daily_recommendations dr JOIN problems p ON dr.problem_id = p.id WHERE dr.recommended_date = ''2026-03-02'' ORDER BY dr.display_order;")
